title: Washington DC Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Washington DC, with a Z-Score of +5.29. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Washington DC is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 17.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 33%, and the wind speed is 15.6 km/h, which is not providing significant relief. 
 The city's infrastructure and residents are under strain due to this prolonged heat wave, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to protect residents and infrastructure.
